failures.description: The agent used an overbroad catalog query with available_only=false despite the user specifically asking for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner. The agent understood the product type and overall goal, but the required tool call should have constrained the catalog search to available items. At index 1, the Coordinator instead planned to call ProductCatalogSearch with "available_only": false, explicitly including unavailable products. All required information was already available from the user request, and this incorrect plan propagated through the actual tool call at indexes 2-3. Although the final answer happened to be correct because the cheapest overall item was available, the plan/tool sequence still deviated from the required availability constraint and was never corrected.
